entities.name: NCT01720446
entities.context: Trial to Evaluate Cardiovascular and Other Long-term Outcomes With Semaglutide in Subjects With Type 2 Diabetes (NCT01720446), SUSTAIN 6

attributes.descriptive_title: Trial to Evaluate Cardiovascular and Other Long-term Outcomes With Semaglutide in Subjects With Type 2 Diabetes

entities.name: Phase 3
entities.context: Phase: PHASE3 as listed in the trial record

entities.name: Novo Nordisk A/S
entities.context: Lead Sponsor: Novo Nordisk A/S

entities.name: semaglutide
entities.context: Semaglutide, a GLP-1 receptor agonist, administered subcutaneously once weekly at 0.5 mg or 1.0 mg doses

entities.name: Semaglutide 0.5 mg QW SC
entities.context: Experimental arm: semaglutide 0.5 mg once weekly subcutaneously after dose escalation from 0.25 mg

entities.name: Semaglutide 1.0 mg QW SC
entities.context: Experimental arm: semaglutide 1.0 mg once weekly subcutaneously after dose escalation from 0.25 mg then 0.5 mg

entities.name: Placebo QW SC
entities.context: Placebo comparator arms: volume-matched placebo administered subcutaneously once weekly

entities.name: Diabetes Mellitus, Type 2
entities.context: Subjects with type 2 diabetes mellitus enrolled in the trial

entities.name: Arm A: Semaglutide 0.5 mg
entities.context: Experimental arm: Semaglutide 0.5 mg once weekly subcutaneously

entities.name: Arm B: Semaglutide 1.0 mg
entities.context: Experimental arm: Semaglutide 1.0 mg once weekly subcutaneously

entities.name: Arm C: Semaglutide placebo 0.5 mg
entities.context: Placebo comparator arm volume-matched to 0.5 mg semaglutide

entities.name: Arm D: Semaglutide placebo 1.0 mg
entities.context: Placebo comparator arm volume-matched to 1.0 mg semaglutide

entities.name: Adults with type 2 diabetes and cardiovascular risk aged 50+ or 60+
entities.context: Men and women with type 2 diabetes, age ≥50 with clinical CV disease or age ≥60 with subclinical CV disease, HbA1c ≥7.0%

attributes.key_inclusion: Type 2 diabetes, cardiovascular disease evidence, HbA1c ≥7.0%

entities.name: major adverse cardiovascular events
entities.context: Primary endpoint: time from randomisation to first occurrence of MACE (CV death, non-fatal MI, or non-fatal stroke)

attributes.components: cardiovascular death, non-fatal myocardial infarction, non-fatal stroke
attributes.time_frame: Up to end of follow-up (scheduled at week 109)

entities.name: expanded composite cardiovascular outcome
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: time from randomisation to first occurrence of an expanded composite cardiovascular outcome

attributes.time_frame: Up to end of follow-up (scheduled at week 109)

entities.name: all-cause death, non-fatal MI, or non-fatal stroke
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: time from randomisation to first occurrence of all-cause death, non-fatal MI, or non-fatal stroke

attributes.time_frame: Up to end of follow-up (scheduled at week 109)

entities.name: glycosylated haemoglobin (HbA1c)
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change from baseline in HbA1c up to week 104

entities.name: fasting plasma glucose
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change from baseline in fasting plasma glucose up to week 104

entities.name: body weight
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change from baseline in body weight up to week 104

entities.name: urinary albumin to creatinine ratio
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change from baseline in urinary albumin to creatinine ratio up to week 104

entities.name: hypoglycaemic events
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: incidence of hypoglycaemic events during the trial (week 0-109)

entities.name: HbA1c
entities.context: HbA1c ≥7.0% required at screening as inclusion criterion; also measured as secondary outcome

attributes.use: Patient selection (inclusion criterion) and efficacy assessment

relations.evidence: Phase: PHASE3 as listed in the trial record
Lead Sponsor: Novo Nordisk A/S
Trial evaluates semaglutide 0.5 mg and 1.0 mg subcutaneously once weekly in experimental arms
Experimental arm: semaglutide 0.5 mg once weekly subcutaneously
Experimental arm: semaglutide 1.0 mg once weekly subcutaneously
Placebo comparator arms: volume-matched placebo administered subcutaneously once weekly
Trial evaluates cardiovascular and other long-term outcomes with semaglutide in subjects with type 2 diabetes
Semaglutide evaluated as treatment for type 2 diabetes mellitus in SUSTAIN 6
Primary endpoint: time from randomisation to first occurrence of MACE (CV death, non-fatal MI, or non-fatal stroke)
Secondary endpoint: time from randomisation to first occurrence of an expanded composite cardiovascular outcome

Secondary endpoint: change from baseline in body weight up to week 104
Secondary endpoint: change from baseline in urinary albumin to creatinine ratio up to week 104
Secondary endpoint: incidence of hypoglycaemic events during the trial (week 0-109)
HbA1c ≥7.0% required at screening as inclusion criterion
